title: Infested Netherrack & End Stone
description: INFESTED Netherrack & End Stone to End and Nether Dimensions with Spawn Mob System (Endermite and Blaze) (infected)
body:
# Mod adds new types of Infested Blocks: Netherrack and End Stone 

![Ы](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12174561100a1b24bca0734871e0320fc997fbdf.png)

**Sometimes there will be Infested Blocks among netherrack and end stone blocks, from which mobs will appear (In The End and Nether)**
